name: Boom Duello
description: Boom Duello is a fast-paced 2-player TNT battle game where only one can survive. Face off against your friend on two unique maps, plan your moves, place your TNT wisely, and blow your opponent away to claim victory.
instructions: Mobile controls are available Player 1 Controls Move W A S D Throw Bomb R ---------------------------------------- Player 2 Controls Move Arrow Keys uarr darr larr rarr Throw Bomb P
